'''Renxis Dielle''' was a [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] serving the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] during the final decades of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].

==Biography==
A [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]], Renxis Dielle was [[Jedi training/Legends|educated]] in the ways of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] by the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] during the [[Separatist Crisis/Legends|Separatist Crisis]] which plagued the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Galactic Senate]]. Just prior to the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], Padawan Dielle was dispatched to [[Kabal/Legends|Kabal]] with fellow Knights [[Ixian Rovieda]], [[Plessus Ghon]], and [[Nygreena Clo]] to end the month-long riots in the capital city of [[Shoribus]]. The riots begun due to planet-wide food shortages, and were only ended when the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] dropped parcels of rations and other food stuff within the city. The riots claimed many lives, including that of [[Premier]]e [[Jan Dovu]]; holo-footage of several robed bodies were transmitted over the [[HoloNet/Legends|HoloNet]] and the [[Jedi High Council/Legends|Jedi High Council]] confirmed that Dielle and the other Jedi were indeed dead.<ref name="HNN" />
